title: Video idea to storyboard workflow
user_goal: As a creator, provide a short video idea and receive a creative brief, script, shot list, storyboard prompts, image artifact refs and review report.
expected_user_visible_outputs: at least four storyboard shot artifact refs
missing_evidence: redaction scan for raw prompt and token leakage
claim_guard_notes: This scenario must not be counted as a generic video production platform or unrestricted external provider execution.
redaction_guard_notes: Future evidence must not include raw prompt, API key, Bearer token, raw provider payload or raw artifact content.
